economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Anishnabeek Outfitting Inc. (100% owned), 2748-6794 Quebec Inc. (100% owned), and Mahingan Development Corporation (100% owned, non-profit, equity method). Mahingan Development Corporation generated revenues of $309,069 and expenses of $336,255 in 2020.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (March 31, 2020). Nation is located in Quebec. Three wholly-owned subsidiaries: Anishnabeek Outfitting Inc. and 2748-6794 Quebec Inc. are consolidated; Mahingan Development Corporation is accounted for on modified equity basis (non-profit, no share capital). Net loans to investee company (Mahingan) of $708,567 recorded as liability. ISC funding per reconciliation note is $601,323. Prior year total revenues per segment disclosure show $1,951,062 vs $1,940,735 on face of statement — minor discrepancy noted. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Pension plan administered by Native Benefits Plan with $13,385 employer contribution in 2020. Long-term debt of $57,290 relates to Mahingan Development Corporation subsidiary.
